requests.message: Hey Amahle! I see we're both preparing for finals. Would love to have a study buddy to revise with!
Hi Sipho! I'm struggling a bit with Calculus. Would you mind if we study together sometime?
Themba! I noticed you're also doing Physical Sciences. Let's be study buddies!
Hi Themba! I saw your progress in Life Sciences - you're doing amazing! Would you like to exchange study notes?
Hey! I'm looking for someone to do practice exams with. Interested?
Hi Naledi! I'd love to be study buddies - we can help each other with our weak subjects!
Hey Themba! I noticed we're both strong in Mathematics. Let's team up!

buddyProfiles.name: Amahle Nkosi
buddyProfiles.bio: Grade 12 learner at Pretoria Girls High. Passionate about Physics and dream of studying Engineering at UCT.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Achieve 80%+ in Physical Sciences and Mathematics to secure engineering scholarship.
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Study buddy for problem-solving sessions and exam prep

buddyProfiles.name: Sipho Dlamini
buddyProfiles.bio: Matric learner at Mthatha High. Love sports and studying. Looking for accountability partners.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Pass all subjects with distinction, especially Accounting and Economics.
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Someone to do practice questions with and keep me accountable

buddyProfiles.name: Lwazi Moloi
buddyProfiles.bio: Aspiring medical student. Currently focusing on Life Sciences and Chemistry for my future in medicine.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Get into medical school - need high marks in Life Sciences and Physical Sciences.
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Study partner for practical experiments and diagram practice

buddyProfiles.name: Naledi Zwane
buddyProfiles.bio: Grade 12 at Johannesburg Girls High. Love art and science. Want to study Architecture.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Balance creative and analytical subjects. Need top marks in Mathematics.
buddyProfiles.studySchedule: Flexible - I study in bursts and take breaks
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Buddy for Mathematics drills and creative study techniques

buddyProfiles.name: Kgoshi Mokoena
buddyProfiles.bio: Matric student from Polokwane. Big soccer fan but serious about studies too.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Complete matric with flying colors and get into university.
buddyProfiles.studySchedule: After school until dinner, then free time
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Someone to quiz me before tests

buddyProfiles.name: Kwanda Sithole
buddyProfiles.bio: Focus-driven learner from Durban. Love a challenge, especially tough math problems.
buddyProfiles.studyGoals: Master advanced calculus and apply to engineering faculty.
buddyProfiles.lookingFor: Study buddy for challenging problem sets
